content.title: Node.js HubSpot CRM Integration API
content.short_description: This is a Node. js Express REST API server that serves as the backend for CRM contact management
content.description: This is a Node.js Express REST API server that serves as the backend for CRM contact management. The API integrates directly with HubSpot's CRM platform to create and retrieve contacts, providing secure endpoints for frontend applications. It implements proper error handling, CORS configuration, and environment-based security practices.
content.role: I developed a complete Express.js REST API with HubSpot CRM integration, implementing secure contact creation and listing endpoints. I configured CORS for development environments, implemented comprehensive error handling for API failures, and set up environment variable management for sensitive data like API tokens. I also created multiple server implementations to demonstrate different architectural approaches.

achievements: Successfully integrated with HubSpot's CRM API for real-time data synchronization
Implemented secure API practices with environment-based token management
Created robust error handling for common CRM scenarios
Established scalable backend architecture for CRM operations
technologies: Node.js Express.js for REST API development
Error handling and HTTP status codes
